name: Energy Transfer
confidenceReason: Largest US midstream pipeline network. 7%+ distribution yield with 10%+ EPS growth. Low valuation but high leverage and MLP complexity.
bullCase: Energy Transfer has the most diversified midstream footprint in the US, with exposure to crude, natural gas, NGLs, and LNG exports. The $0.32/unit quarterly distribution yields 7-8% and is covered 1.9x. Permian Basin volume growth provides organic throughput growth without new capital commitments.
bearCase: At 4.6x Net Debt/EBITDA, ET has the highest leverage among major midstream peers. A deterioration in credit markets, distribution cut risk, or volume decline from customer bankruptcies could trigger significant unit price declines.
description: Energy Transfer LP, together with its subsidiaries, provides energy-related services in the United States.
